- Clarify Project Requirements
  - [x] Full-stack expense and revenue dashboard with React frontend and Express backend
  - [x] MySQL database for data persistence
  - [x] Admin and user roles with role-based dashboards
  - [x] Location-wise monthly and yearly expense/revenue tracking
  - [x] Fiscal year calculations (April to March)
  - [x] Charts and visualizations with Recharts
  - [x] Responsive design without emojis
  - [x] Secure backend with JWT authentication

- Scaffold the Project
  - [x] Create backend directory structure with Express.js
  - [x] Create frontend directory structure with React/Vite
  - [x] Set up database configuration
  - [x] Initialize npm packages for both frontend and backend

- Customize the Project
  - [x] Backend Authentication (Register, Login, JWT)
  - [x] Backend Controllers (Auth, Data, Locations)
  - [x] Backend Routes and Middleware
  - [x] Database initialization script with default data
  - [x] Frontend components (Sidebar, Charts, StatCards)
  - [x] Frontend pages (Login, Register, UserDashboard, AdminDashboard, DataEntry)
  - [x] Frontend styling (global, layout, forms, charts)
  - [x] API client with Axios and interceptors
  - [x] State management with Zustand
  - [x] Protected routes and role-based access control

- Install Required Extensions
  - [x] No extensions needed - project uses npm packages only

- Compile the Project
  - Backend: Install dependencies with npm
  - Frontend: Install dependencies with npm
  - Database: Run init-db.js for schema and default data

- Create and Run Task
  - Backend: Run with 'npm run dev' or 'npm start'
  - Frontend: Run with 'npm run dev'

- Launch the Project
  - Backend: http://localhost:5000
  - Frontend: http://localhost:3000
  - Default login: admin@example.com / admin123

- Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - [x] README.md created with comprehensive documentation
  - [x] Backend README.md with API endpoints and setup
  - [x] Frontend README.md with features and setup
  - [x] .env.example created for configuration
  - [x] This checklist updated with all completed tasks

## Project Summary

Complete full-stack Expense and Revenue Management Dashboard with:
- **Frontend**: React 18, Vite, Recharts, Zustand, Axios, Responsive CSS
- **Backend**: Express.js, MySQL, JWT, bcryptjs, Role-based access control
- **Features**: User data entry, Admin monitoring, Monthly/Yearly analysis, Location-wise reporting
- **Security**: Password hashing, JWT tokens, Input validation, SQL injection prevention
- **Database**: 22 pre-configured locations, Fiscal year support (April-March)
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile and desktop optimized without emojis
